summary: Parallelize pytest in local and CI entry points with explicit dependency and workflow governance coverage.
rationale: The pytest acceleration slice must update the dev dependency lock and the protected CI workflow commands together so local and pull-request verification use the same parallel pytest engine.
dependency_rationale: pytest-xdist is required for the CI workflow and local test script to run pytest workers through the existing uv-managed dev environment.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run --group dev ruff check src tests experiments tools
uv run --group dev ty check src tests tools
deletion_targets: serial-only full pytest execution in protected CI
risks: pytest-xdist can expose hidden shared state between tests; parallel-only failures must be fixed locally instead of hidden with retries.
Tach and xdist do not compose for the no-argument changed-test path when no tests are selected, so that path remains serial.
CI runner speedup may differ from local speedup because worker count, CPU, and file-system contention differ.
